title: I Am Jesus' Little Lamb
author: Henrietta von Hayn
story: Written by a Moravian deaconess for the children in her care. Its tender imagery of Jesus as the Good Shepherd carrying His little lamb speaks to the heart of childlike faith.

lines: I am Jesus' little lamb, Ever glad at heart I am
For my Shepherd gently guides me, Knows my need, and well provides me, Loves me ev'ry day the same, Even calls me by my name
Day by day, at home, away, Jesus is my Staff and Stay
When I hunger, Jesus feeds me, Into pleasant pastures leads me
When I thirst, He bids me go Where the quiet waters flow
Who so happy as I am, Even now the Shepherd's lamb
And when my short life is ended, By His angel host attended, He shall fold me to His breast, There within His arms to rest
